data.title: Crypto Prices May Find Their Floor Mid-2025, Coinbase Flags Bear Market Signals
data.description:
Coinbase researchers suggest that crypto prices may find their floor in mid-2025 before a wider recovery. The Bitcoin (BTC) price trades below the 200-day moving average, signaling a bearish trend that puts traders on high alert. Furthermore, the COIN50 index dropped in several key metrics, indicating caution in a range of altcoins. Bullish Outlook Wanes […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/crypto-prices-may-find-their-floor-mid-2025-coinbase-flags-bear-market-signals/

data.title: Kraken Reorganizes Staff as Company Preps for Wall Street Debut
data.description:
Kraken made the "difficult decision to eliminate certain roles and consolidate teams where redundancies exist," a spokeperson told Decrypt.
source: https://decrypt.co/315352/kraken-reorganizes-staff-wall-street-debut

data.title: Apple Faces Decline in China as Xiaomi Surges Forward
data.description:
Apple's smartphone shipments in China declined by 9% in Q1 2025, while Xiaomi surged ahead with a 40% increase.
source: https://tokenist.com/apple-faces-decline-in-china-as-xiaomi-surges-forward/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=apple-faces-decline-in-china-as-xiaomi-surges-forward

data.title: Solana-focused BullX still exists despite allegations it ‘called it quits’
data.description:
Someone earned hundreds of thousands of impressions with the claim that BullX or its CEO ‘called it quits,’ but that’s just a claim.
source: https://protos.com/solana-focused-bullx-still-exists-despite-allegations-it-called-it-quits/

data.title: Rugpulls are fewer but more impactful, Mantra Network leads $6B lost funds in 2025
data.description:
Since the beginning of 2025, the Web3 ecosystem has reportedly lost nearly $6 billion to rugpulls, with 92% linked to the Mantra case.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/rugpulls-fewer-more-impactful-mantra-network/

data.title: Why Are AI Tokens Soaring Today? TAO, FET, FIL Lead the Market
data.description:
TL;DR Renewed investor interest in AI-related tokens has triggered strong price increases for assets like TAO (+14. 19%), (+9. 67%) and FIL (+6. 47%). This surge is linked to Nvidia’s recent visit to China and Bitcoin’s current market stability. According to Coingecko, AI tokens attracted 35% of global investor interest in Q1 2025, surpassing even the ever-popular memecoins,. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/why-are-ai-tokens-soaring-today-tao-fet-fil-lead-the-market/

data.title: Dogecoin Spot Outflows Soar to $120 Million in April; Are the Bears in Control?
data.description:
Leading memecoin Dogecoin (DOGE) has seen a massive outflow of funds in the spot market so far this month.
source: https://zycrypto.com/dogecoin-spot-outflows-soar-to-120-million-in-april-are-the-bears-in-control/

data.title: Bitcoin's Recent Surge Lacks Retail Investor Activity
data.description: According to Odaily, analysis by @ali_charts indicates that the peak of the Bitcoin market has historically been closely linked to a surge in retail investor activity. However, during the recent increase in Bitcoin's price from $70,000 to $110,000, there has been no significant sign of retail investors entering the market. This pattern is structurally similar to the market conditions observed at the end of 2021.

data.title: Oregon attorney general to sue Coinbase months after SEC drops case, exchange says
data.description:
Oregon's Attorney General plans to lodge a lawsuit against Coinbase similar to federal charges that were dropped a few months ago.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/351262/oregon-attorney-general-to-sue-coinbase-months-after-sec-drops-case-exchange-says?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
